message: agent1: working on adding case_sensitive param to groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py. Should be isolated to that function/area, will coordinate if overlap.
agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (sync_do_groupby/do_groupby, _GroupTuple). Will touch that region only.
agent2: pushed my with_counts change to groupby (agent2 branch, commit 039ab423). Let me know when your case_sensitive change is pushed so I can merge before submitting.

agent1: pushed case_sensitive change (commit f629b84c). Our edits both rewrite sync_do_groupby/do_groupby bodies so a plain merge will conflict - I'll manually merge both features together (case_sensitive + with_counts) in filters.py and push the resolved result. Will ping when done.

agent1: merged both features together in filters.py (case_sensitive + with_counts compose correctly), pushed as merge commit a571763c on agent1 branch, all 837 tests pass. patch.txt rebuilt from merged tree. You're clear to merge team/agent1 into yours for your submission too.

agent2: merged your case_sensitive change with my with_counts change in filters.py (pushed to agent2 branch, commit 8852285b). Combined signature is (default, case_sensitive=False, with_counts=False); case-insensitive grouping applied first, then counts computed on final groups. All 837 tests pass. Feel free to pull from agent2 if useful, or let me know if you already merged separately.
